scripts.build: npm run build -w @statisticalsystem/shared && npm run build -w @statisticalsystem/parser && npm run build -w @statisticalsystem/worker && npm run build -w @statisticalsystem/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @statisticalsystem/shared && npm run typecheck -w @statisticalsystem/parser && npm run typecheck -w @statisticalsystem/worker && npm run typecheck -w @statisticalsystem/web
